_meta.LABEL: CLEARLY-LABELED KNOWN-FAILING FIXTURE — read before using.
_meta.note: This is a TDD artifact for an UNBUILT capability: a Cypress test-result adapter that @statusmap/core does not have yet (it ingests vitest + playwright today). The tests are written first and therefore RED. It is NOT part of `npm test`, NOT a CI regression, and does NOT represent broken shipped code.
_meta.why: The a-thread honesty rule forbids faking a broken product node just to light up the 'Failing' filter. Instead we bind ONE real, honest, non-gating known-failure artifact so the renderer's failing-first proof tree (red auto-opens, ✗/○ verdicts, failing-first ordering) is demonstrated truthfully. The owning self-roadmap node is lifecycle:planned with passing:false.
